class.label: Pagina
class.name: PAGINA

button.name: PUBLICAR
button.label: Publicar
button.mess: Esta seguro que desea Publicar la PAGINA?

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Configuracion.Paginas.PAGINA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Configuracion.Paginas.PAGINA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(CFG03_PAGINAS.oi_pagina) as CNT from CFG03_PAGINAS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and CFG03_PAGINAS.oi_pagina={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(CFG03_PAGINAS.d_pagina,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(CFG03_PAGINAS.c_pagina,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_pagina, T.c_pagina, T.d_pagina, T.c_tipo, T.f_publicado, T.f_cambio, T.c_modo_pub, T.f_time_pub FROM CFG03_PAGINAS as T WHERE T.oi_pagina in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %}) ')/ROWS/ROW

class.resource:
<html>
	<head>
		<META HTTP-EQUIV="PRAGMA" CONTENT="NO-CACHE" />
		<META HTTP-EQUIV="CACHE-CONTROL" CONTENT="NO-CACHE" />

		<script type="text/javascript">
			function Replace(strin, strfnd, strrpl)
			{
				var strout="", lastpos;
				for (lastpos=0, pos=strin.indexOf(strfnd); pos!=-1; lastpos=pos+strfnd.length, pos=strin.indexOf(strfnd,lastpos))
				{                
					strout+=strin.substr(lastpos,pos-lastpos);
					strout+=strrpl;
				} 		
				strout+=strin.substr(lastpos);
				return strout;
			}                 
			
			function GetUrlVariable(pName) 
			{
				pName = "&" + pName + "=";
				
				var strResult = "";
				var strStartVariable;
				var strQueryString = "&" + location.href.substr(location.href.indexOf("?") + 1, 512);
				
				if (strQueryString.toUpperCase().indexOf(pName.toUpperCase()) >= 0) {
			    	strStartVariable = strQueryString.substr(strQueryString.toUpperCase().indexOf(pName.toUpperCase())+pName.length, 512);
			    	var hasta = strStartVariable.substr(0, 512).indexOf("&");
			    	strResult=(hasta<0?strStartVariable:strStartVariable.substr(0, hasta));
				}
				
				strResult = Replace(strResult, "%20", " ");
				strResult = Replace(strResult, "%3F", "?");
				strResult = Replace(strResult, "%26", "&");
				strResult = Replace(strResult, "%25", "%");
				return strResult;
			}
			
			function GetBrowserLang() 
			{
			    var strLang;
			    var arrLang;
			    
			    try { strLang = navigator.language + ""; } catch (ex) {}
			    if (strLang == "undefined") { try { strLang = navigator.userLanguage + ""; } catch (ex) {} }
			    
			    arrLang = strLang.split('-');
			    switch (arrLang[0].toUpperCase()) {
			        case "ES": strLang = "SPA"; break
			        case "EN": strLang = "ENG"; break
			        case "PT": strLang = "POR"; break
			        //case "FR": strLang = "FRA"; break
			        //case "DE": strLang = "GER"; break
			        default:   strLang = "ENG"; break
			    }
			    return strLang;
			}

			function GetUrlLang() 
			{
				var strURL=""+location.href;
				
				//Obtengo la URL sin parametros.... 
				strURL=strURL.split("?")[0];
				
				//Obtengo la PAGINA         
				strURL=strURL.split("/"); strURL=strURL[strURL.length-1];
				
				//Obtengo las Partes
				strURL=strURL.split(".");
				if (strURL.length<3) return "";
				
				//Obtengo el IDIOMA
				return strURL[strURL.length-2];
			}

			function OnLoad()
			{                 
				var strLang="";
				if (strLang=="") strLang=GetUrlVariable("lang");
				if (strLang=="") strLang=GetUrlLang();
				if (strLang=="") strLang=GetBrowserLang();
				if (strLang=="") strLang="SPA";

				window.location=Replace("#URL#",".LANG.","."+strLang.toUpperCase()+".");
			}
		</script>
	</head>
	<body onload="OnLoad()" style="width:100%;height:100%;background-color:#FFFFFF;cursor:default;PADDING-RIGHT:0px;PADDING-LEFT:0px;PADDING-BOTTOM:0px;MARGIN:0px;PADDING-TOP:0px;BORDER-TOP:none;BORDER-RIGHT:none;BORDER-LEFT:none;BORDER-BOTTOM:none;">
	</body>
</html>

<html>
	<head>
		<META HTTP-EQUIV="PRAGMA" CONTENT="NO-CACHE" />
		<META HTTP-EQUIV="CACHE-CONTROL" CONTENT="NO-CACHE" />

		<script type="text/javascript">
			function Replace(strin, strfnd, strrpl)
			{
				var strout="", lastpos;
				for (lastpos=0, pos=strin.indexOf(strfnd); pos!=-1; lastpos=pos+strfnd.length, pos=strin.indexOf(strfnd,lastpos))
				{                
					strout+=strin.substr(lastpos,pos-lastpos);
					strout+=strrpl;
				} 		
				strout+=strin.substr(lastpos);
				return strout;
			}                 
			
			function GetUrlVariable(pName) 
			{
				pName = "&" + pName + "=";
				
				var strResult = "";
				var strStartVariable;
				var strQueryString = "&" + location.href.substr(location.href.indexOf("?") + 1, 512);
				
				if (strQueryString.toUpperCase().indexOf(pName.toUpperCase()) >= 0) {
			    	strStartVariable = strQueryString.substr(strQueryString.toUpperCase().indexOf(pName.toUpperCase())+pName.length, 512);
			    	var hasta = strStartVariable.substr(0, 512).indexOf("&");
			    	strResult=(hasta<0?strStartVariable:strStartVariable.substr(0, hasta));
				}
				
				strResult = Replace(strResult, "%20", " ");
				strResult = Replace(strResult, "%3F", "?");
				strResult = Replace(strResult, "%26", "&");
				strResult = Replace(strResult, "%25", "%");
				return strResult;
			}
			
			function GetBrowserLang() 
			{
			    var strLang;
			    var arrLang;
			    
			    try { strLang = navigator.language + ""; } catch (ex) {}
			    if (strLang == "undefined") { try { strLang = navigator.userLanguage + ""; } catch (ex) {} }
			    
			    arrLang = strLang.split('-');
			    switch (arrLang[0].toUpperCase()) {
			        case "ES": strLang = "SPA"; break
			        case "EN": strLang = "ENG"; break
			        case "PT": strLang = "POR"; break
			        //case "FR": strLang = "FRA"; break
			        //case "DE": strLang = "GER"; break
			        default:   strLang = "ENG"; break
			    }
			    return strLang;
			}

			function GetUrlLang() 
			{
				var strURL=""+location.href;
				
				//Obtengo la URL sin parametros.... 
				strURL=strURL.split("?")[0];
				
				//Obtengo la PAGINA         
				strURL=strURL.split("/"); strURL=strURL[strURL.length-1];
				
				//Obtengo las Partes
				strURL=strURL.split(".");
				if (strURL.length<3) return "";
				
				//Obtengo el IDIOMA
				return strURL[strURL.length-2];
			}

			function OnLoad()
			{                 
				var strLang="";
				if (strLang=="") strLang=GetUrlVariable("lang");
				if (strLang=="") strLang=GetUrlLang();
				if (strLang=="") strLang=GetBrowserLang();
				if (strLang=="") strLang="SPA";
				
				var ProgList=new Array();

    		var now=new Date();
    		var nowYear=now.getFullYear().toString();
    		var nowDate=(10000+(now.getMonth()+1)*100+now.getDate()).toString().substr(1);

    		var url="";
    		var obj;
    		
    		#ADD-PROG#
    		
    		obj=new Object();
    		obj.Anno="";
    		obj.Inicio="";
    		obj.Fin="";
    		obj.URL="../../../blank.htm";
    		ProgList.push(obj);
    		
    		for (t=0; t<ProgList.length; t++)
    		{  
    			obj=ProgList[t];
    			
    			//Verifico el AÑO
    			if (obj.Anno!="" && obj.Anno!=nowYear) continue;
    			
    			//Verifico el MES y el DIA INICIO
    			if (obj.Inicio!="" && obj.Inicio>nowDate) continue;
    			
    			//Verifico el MES y el DIA FIN
    			if (obj.Fin!="" && obj.Fin<nowDate) continue;
    			
    			//Verifico la URL
    			if (obj.URL=="") continue;

    			url=obj.URL;
    			break;
    		}
    		
				                
				window.location=Replace(url,".LANG.","."+strLang.toUpperCase()+".");
			}
		</script>
	</head>
	<body onload="OnLoad()" style="width:100%;height:100%;background-color:#FFFFFF;cursor:default;PADDING-RIGHT:0px;PADDING-LEFT:0px;PADDING-BOTTOM:0px;MARGIN:0px;PADDING-TOP:0px;BORDER-TOP:none;BORDER-RIGHT:none;BORDER-LEFT:none;BORDER-BOTTOM:none;">
	</body>
</html>

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Configuracion.Paginas.ADJUNTO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Configuracion.Paginas.ADJUNTO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(CFG03_ADJUNTOS.oi_adjunto) as CNT from CFG03_ADJUNTOS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and CFG03_ADJUNTOS.oi_adjunto={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(CFG03_ADJUNTOS.d_adjunto,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(CFG03_ADJUNTOS.c_adjunto,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and CFG03_ADJUNTOS.oi_pagina={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_adjunto, T.c_adjunto, T.oi_file, T.d_adjunto FROM CFG03_ADJUNTOS as T WHERE T.oi_adjunto in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %}) ')/ROWS/ROW
